instruction: 把各渠道销售情况记一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '渠道'
ws['B1'] = '访问量'
ws['C1'] = '转化率(%)'
ws['D1'] = '销售额(万元)'
ws['A2'] = '官网'
ws['B2'] = 12500
ws['C2'] = 2.8
ws['D2'] = 35.0
ws['A3'] = '小程序'
ws['B3'] = 8800
ws['C3'] = 5.2
ws['D3'] = 45.8
ws['A4'] = 'APP'
ws['B4'] = 6200
ws['C4'] = 6.1
ws['D4'] = 37.8
ws['A5'] = '第三方平台'
ws['B5'] = 25000
ws['C5'] = 1.9
ws['D5'] = 47.5
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/sales_channels.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把各渠道销售情况记一下
从/home/user/Desktop/sales_channels.xlsx中找到转化率最高的渠道，在/home/user/Desktop/channel_report.txt末尾追加：'最高转化率渠道：APP（6.1%）'，保存
